idea-plugin.name: 码字计时器 · 摸鱼休息提醒 (IDEA 版)
idea-plugin.vendor: 琼台师范学院万象大模型研究社 Piggy
idea-plugin.description:
还在用「我感觉今天码了不少」自我安慰？装上它，你的摸鱼和爆肝都将被无情计量。🐷

一个蹲在 IDE 里陪你肝代码的小工具，专治「不知道自己到底敲了多少」的现代病：

  • 📊 码字计数：今日 / 累计码了多少字、肝了多久、手速（CPM）几何。别再说「我写了好多」，让数据打脸。
  • ⏰ 幽默休息提醒：连续码到设定时长，它弹个沙雕气泡催你起来晃晃，拯救你的颈椎和屁股。可「已休息」打卡，也能「再战一会」贪睡 5 分钟。
  • 🎆 强打字动效：专属「码字舞台」把每次按键变成上飘光点、流动弹幕与炸裂大字——打工也能打出仪式感，键盘敲出蹦迪味。
  • 🤫 全程不枯燥：状态栏和提醒文案全是梗，陪你笑着重构人生（和代码）。

数据全存在你本地 IDE 配置里，绝不上传，社恐友好。打开右侧「码字计时器」工具窗，随时围观自己的辉煌战绩。

装上它，今晚周报「工作时长」一栏，终于有底气了。💪

👋 作者的话：这是我作为新人开发者的第一个小作品（v0.5，2026-07-17），难免有不完善的地方。如果它能给你的敲码日常带来一点点乐趣，就是我最大的动力！欢迎大家放心试用，也非常期待你的反馈——后续我会持续打磨、优化、加新功能，请多多支持，一起把它养大～ 🌱

Typing & Time Counter · Fun Break Reminder

Still comforting yourself with "I feel like I coded a lot today"? Install this, and both your slacking and your grinding will be mercilessly measured. 🐷

A tiny sidekick that sits in your IDE and cures the modern disease of "no idea how much I actually typed":

  • 📊 Typing counter: today's / total characters, active time, and speed (CPM). Let the data do the talking.
  • ⏰ Funny break reminder: after you grind for a set time, a cheeky bubble nudges you to stand up and save your neck and back. Tap "Done resting", or "Snooze" for a few more minutes.
  • 🎆 Punchy typing effects: a dedicated "Typing Stage" turns every keystroke into rising sparks, flowing danmaku and bursting big characters — coding with a sense of ceremony.
  • 🤫 Never boring: the status bar and reminders are full of jokes, so you can refactor your life (and your code) with a smile.

All data stays in your local IDE config and is never uploaded. Open the "Typing Timer" tool window on the right to watch your own glorious stats.

👋 A note from the author: This is my very first little project as a beginner developer (v0.5, 2026-07-17), so it's surely not perfect yet. If it brings a bit of fun to your coding day, that's my greatest motivation! Feel free to give it a try, and I'd love your feedback — I'll keep polishing, improving and adding features. Thanks for your support, let's grow it together～ 🌱

作者 / Author：琼台师范学院万象大模型研究社 Piggy · v0.5 · 2026-07-17
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 0.5 — 首次发布：码字计数、时间计数、固定时间幽默休息提醒、码字舞台强动效、休息倒计时圆环、设置项与本地持久化。

applicationConfigurable.displayName: 码字计时 & 休息提醒
